creator: vt@nmp.bsdjeunz.org
text:
A trial to port Eggdrop in a system-wide installation context for
	FreeBSD. I'm having doubts with the version number, 1.6.0.r1 stands
	for 1.6.0RC1 ( Release Candidate 1 ). The next version will be 1.6.0
	( going to release tomorow according to what tell me an develloper ).
	Is 1.6.0.r1 less than 1.6.0 or the other hand ? Moreover I'm going to
	improve the way of I make the port, in few days in order to reduce the
	port's size. Hoping you enjoy it. Thanks
	P.S. : Excuse me sincerely for my very poor and bad english, but I am
	still a french pupili ;)
